creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
Thank you for the pointers.  Indeed, it seems it is some issue with my ports install, or perhaps pkg db.  It seems to have crept in recently since I was able to compile and install ports just fine.  To prove that, I have compiled and installed anydesk with no issues in a fresh jail.

I will troubleshoot my ports/pkg install.  I am marking this ticket as closed, as it is not relevant to anydesk.

Many thanks for all the help, much appreciated.
